name: Veal Piccata (Italian Style Veal Scallops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle both sides of veal with salt and pepper.
2. Cut into squares, about 3 inches x 3 inches.
3. Dredge in flour. Shake off any excess.
4. Heat the oil and butter in a heavy skillet over high heat for 1 minute.
5. Add the veal. Brown, 1 to 2 minutes per side.
6. Drain on paper toweling.
7. Add the lemon juice and parsley to the skillet.
8. Stir quickly to incorporate any browned bits.
9. Return the veal to the skillet.
10. Warm for a minute or two, basting with the lemon & parsley mixture.
11. Serve.
